summary: The diff shows changes to HoustonFooter.tsx and Footer.tsx (per file summary) to make footer text white. The Footer.tsx file summary explicitly states 'all text elements now use full white (text-white) instead of semi-transparent white variants', and HoustonFooter.tsx shows a bottom bar section. REQ-1 requires both files to have white text in the 4th child div's bottom bar. The evidence is consistent with the requirement being implemented.
